scripts.dev: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && bun --hot src/main.tsx
scripts.station: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && bun src/main.tsx
scripts.station:profile: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && STATION_PROFILE=1 bun src/main.tsx
scripts.station:devtools: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && DEV=true bun src/main.tsx
scripts.station:isolated: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && ./scripts/station-isolated.sh
scripts.e2e:persist: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && bun src/host/e2eReattachDemo.ts
scripts.host:dev: bun run link:station && bun run repair:node-pty && bun src/host/e2eReattachDemo.ts --dev --hold
scripts.test:agents: bun run repair:node-pty && STATION_PTY_SMOKE=1 STATION_PTY_SMOKE_TUI=1 bun test src/input/stationInput.e2e.test.tsx src/terminal/ptyPipeline.smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:pty: bun run repair:node-pty && STATION_PTY_SMOKE=1 bun test src/terminal/pty/localPtyTerminal.test.ts src/terminal/ptyPipeline.smoke.test.ts src/terminal/pty/localPtyBridgeHardening.test.ts src/input/stationInput.e2e.test.tsx
